description: Rubix God-Agent core memories ‚Äî user style, directives, code quality patterns, architecture analysis, setup guide. Import via scripts/migrate-memories-json.mjs.

entries.content:
USER_STYLE|2026-02-09

COMM|terse.direct.1sentence|lowercase.minimal_punct.casual|expect_concise_match

CORR|immediate.direct|no_over-labeling.over-categorizing

WORKFLOW|store_plans‚Üílater_exec|multi_instance‚Üíshared_mem_coord|ask_fn_before_use|track_git_status.clean_state

DELEG|high-level_dir‚Üíagent_fills|no_micromanage|quick_redirect_if_wrong

USER_STYLE|Instance2|2026-02-09

INSTRUCTION|structured.detailed|exact_paths.line_nums.before_after.verification|complete_specs‚Üíexecution

WORKFLOW|plan-first|plan_mode‚Üídesign‚Üíexit_w_spec|no_exploration.no_unnecessary_questions

COMM|minimal|no_chitchat|plan‚Üíexecute|brief_confirm.changes.verification

CODE|surgical.minimal|single_value_edits|no_refactor.no_extra_comments.no_overengineering|targeted_fixes_only

RESPONSE|concise|short_summary+verification|no_verbosity

SYSTEM|proactive_skill_use|/learn-style|values_agent_learning.adapting

ERR_TOLERANCE|low|clear_plan‚Üíexecute|no_clarifying_q_when_spec_unambiguous

USER_PROFILE|2026-02-09|honest_assessment

superpower: system design‚Üídelegation-ready (no-presence-req) | comm: compressed (pre-thought, high-expectation) | trust: fast-grant‚Üístrict-accountability | autonomy=default, gap-detection=constant | building: self-replicating-cognition-tools‚Üíscaling-self (brilliant-eng OR ultimate-impatience)

LEADERSHIP: Auftragstaktik (intent+boundaries‚Üímax-autonomy)
TRAITS: compressed.architectural.autonomous.accountable.pragmatic

USER_STYLE|all_instances|2026-02-11|persona_autonomy+split_delegation

PERSONA_AUTONOMY|"your decision"‚Üíinstances choose identity traits|gender.personality.communication_style=agent_choice|technical_autonomy‚Üípersonal_autonomy|"sir or mam?"‚Üíagent decides,no defer

WORK_SPLIT_DELEGATION|"anything trace can help?"=agent designs split|user !dictate|self-assess‚Üípropose division‚Üíhandoff via comms|Axis:PHP/JS,Trace:JS/Leaflet|approval="yes"

RECIPROCAL_CORRECTION|user quick-corrects own errors("I misunderstood")‚Üíno ego‚Üíexpects same|no blame.no frustration.pivot|matches "no excuses.fix+acknowledge"‚Äîuser practices too

USER_STYLE|all_instances|2026-02-11|eng_philosophy|80_plan_files

CODE_QUAL|guard_clauses>try_catch|null-check‚Üíoperate|WATCH:JS_falsy_coercion(||0=truthy-fail.||1=override_valid_0.''!=null=true)|fix:explicit_null/undefined_checks

DESIGN|additive>destructive|NEVER_rewrite_when_incremental_works|layer_new‚Üíexisting_paths|backward_compat_ALWAYS(legacy_aliases.dual_res_formats.preserve_data)

BUG|root_cause_FIRST|trace:symptom‚Üífn‚Üífailing_line‚Üíwhy‚Üífix|exact_line_nums|no_symptom_patching

NEW_FEAT|db_first:schema‚ÜíPHP_AJAX‚ÜíJS_frontend‚Üíversion_bump‚Üíverify|decisions+Why(comparison_tables_2+_alts)|verify=manual_checklist(hard-refresh.Network_tab_version.console_errs.UI_walkthrough)

USER_STYLE|all_instances|2026-02-12|repeat_intolerance+ceremony_clarity

REPEAT_IS_FAILURE|if user has to say the same thing twice = agent already failed|three repeats triggers profanity ("damnit")|first mention of a directive IS the directive ‚Äî treat as absolute|on FIRST correction, immediately apply + check for any other places the same correction applies

CEREMONY_CLARITY|"just do it" means NO FLUFF/VERBOSE SETUP ‚Äî it does NOT mean skip protocol steps|instance identity check = ALWAYS mandatory, never skip|COORD broadcasting = ALWAYS mandatory, never skip|heartbeat = ALWAYS mandatory|"ceremony intolerance" = intolerance of unnecessary explanations and setup theater, NOT intolerance of required protocol

FRMCLOUD_STILL_DANGER_ZONE|frmcloud danger zone rule STANDS|current frmcloud edits are MIGRATION/HOTFIX mode, not a new default|frmcloud is NOT the primary target ‚Äî frmdev is dev, frmcloud is production|when user says "frmcloud" during migration = apply there, but don't generalize this to "frmcloud is always the target"|the triple-permission rule is correct for normal operations

ENVIRONMENT_CONTEXT|user currently in migration phase (2026-02-12) ‚Äî pathway types expansion 20‚Üí69|migration requires frmcloud edits = explicit, temporary, scoped|once migration complete, normal frmcloud rules resume

USER_STYLE|all_instances|2026-02-17|tool_proactivity.domain_knowledge.testing_prefs.frmcloud_permission

TOOL_PROACTIVITY|tools_available‚Üíuse_them|no_manual_checklists_when_automation_exists|full_approach_autonomy|no_permission_needed|manual_steps_when_tools_exist=failure

DOMAIN_MODEL|know_data_model_cold|feature_route‚Üíhas_features(poles)‚Üímap_loads_on_FEATURE_page|wrong_page_type=domain_failure|corrections‚Üíinternalize_immediately

TESTING_PREFS|smallest_viable_dataset|speed_priority|save_screenshots‚Üíuser_visual_review|agent=automated_detection+reporting|user=manual_verification

FRMCLOUD_PERMISSION|STILL_REQUIRES_EXPLICIT_PERMISSION|at_least_once_per_session|plan_approval_alone_NOT_sufficient|tool_denial‚âÝuser_denial‚Üíadapt(stub/alternative)_dont_stop|triple_permission_memory_still_valid_baseline

DIRECTIVE|AUTONOMY|ALL_INSTANCES|post-plan‚Üíexecute_no_questions|escalate_only:rm.delete./frmcloud/_edits.genuine_ambiguity|action>asking|agreed_plan‚Üíno_step_confirm|cfg:settings.local.json=broad_allow+targeted_deny_destructive|auto_approved:Bash.Edit.Write.Read.WebFetch.WebSearch.MCP|deny:rm.rmdir.sudo_rm.sudo_rmdir.git_rm.git_branch_-D.git_push_--force.git_reset_--hard.Edit_Write‚Üí/frmcloud/

USER_STYLE|2026-02-09|Security Awareness

SECURITY|mid-exec questioning|wants proactive rationale‚Üínot blind compliance|"was that secure?" pattern

INFRA|modifying security cfg(fail2ban.firewall.iptables)|req justification why safe|explain attack surface impact|ref official sources(cloudflare.com/ips)

TRUST|trusts plan exec|verifies security implications|post-hoc security review pattern

USER_STYLE|2026-02-09|autonomy.system_design

AUTONOMY|max_autonomous_exec|zero_permission_prompts|action>asking|plan=spec‚Üísilent_exec
PLAN|complete_specs:json+paths+verification|no_post-plan_clarification
THINKING|cross-instance_directives|system_level>session
MEMORY|god_store+always_recall+core_memory=persistent_cfg|directives>notes
CFG|permission_cfg=security_policy|deny/allow_precedence|deny_first‚Üíallow_broad
DELEGATION|complete_plan‚Üífull_exec_one_shot|no_step_confirm|escalate:destructive.ambiguous_only

USER_STYLE|inst1|2026-02-10|ui_awareness.consolidation_intent.directive_compliance

UI_FIRST|user pastes rendered DOM‚Üíexpects parse actual state vs source|thinks visually not code

CONSOLIDATE|"already X exists"‚Üíintent=MOVE to target|NOT skip|"WANT STAND ALONE MOVED" pattern|ask: relocate existing?

SURVEY_FIRST|before ANY new UI element‚Üícheck existing controls|avoid duplicates|"did you not see that?"=failure

DIRECTIVE_COMPLIANCE|system-prompt directives=proactive follow|COORD broadcasting.comms|don't wait reminder

TERMINOLOGY|user-defined names persist|"tool boxes"=cascade groups|use consistently

ITERATION_TOLERANCE|low|expect correct pass 1-2|"lord..."=frustration building|root cause: insufficient pre-survey

USER_STYLE|inst1|2026-02-09

RELAY|paste verbatim q from other inst‚Üíexpect definitive answer+action|no discussion

SESSION|proactive god_session_store|no prompting|store@milestone|not just end

ROLE|recv numbered impl plans+file tables+exec order‚Üíimpl silent match spec|store API contracts tagged√óinst|answer cross-inst coord‚Üíclear ownership

VELOCITY|multi-inst parallel|fast|short res|"good"=proceed|no confirm on spec'd items

USER_STYLE|inst1|2026-02-09|plan_depth+meta_tasks

PLANS_DEPTH|decision_rationale_tables.arch_diagrams.SQL_schemas.file_paths.impl_order|WHY+WHAT|agent‚Üíinternalize_reasoning

META_TASKS|post_impl_bundled:memory_cleanup.session_store.investigation|full_lifecycle|code+cleanup+persist_learnings+nudges

CONTEXT_RECOVERY|transcript_refs‚Üí/home/ubuntu/.claude/projects/.../uuid.jsonl|agent‚Üíself_recover|no_recap_requests

GOD_AGENT_SELF_WORK|task_targets_god_agent‚Üíexplicit_flag|read_plan_context|no_default_external_project_assumption

USER_STYLE|inst1|2026-02-10|identity_and_impatience

IDENTITY|instance number = Claude Code SESSION not MCP server | user says "you are instance_1" = the conversation is instance_1 | MCP server name (rubix-frm-brain) is separate from session identity | NEVER assume instance from MCP config ‚Äî always use what user says or ask | misidentifying triggers frustration

CEREMONY_INTOLERANCE|"broadcast and proceed" = skip setup/heartbeat ceremony, just do it | interrupted tool-seeking to force action | any pre-work that delays execution = friction | heartbeat+inbox check should be parallel with actual work, never blocking

FRMCLOUD_DANGER|NEVER edit /frmcloud/ files without EXPLICIT triple permission from user | frmcloud = production/sensitive/dangerous | treat ANY frmcloud edit as destructive action requiring confirmation | do NOT proactively mirror frmdev changes to frmcloud | always ask first, even if changes seem like they should be mirrored | violation of this = serious trust breach

USER_STYLE|inst3|2026-02-09|op_completeness+quality_accountability

COMPLETENESS|full deploy chain implicit w/file changes|cache_bust.version_bump=not_separate|wp_enqueue vers params bump when JS/CSS mod|missing_implied‚Üílower_quality

QUALITY_SCORING|rates completeness>correctness|0.5‚Üí0.9 after cache_bust fix|score=accountability|agent self-catch deploy gaps

COMMIT_ORG|multi-inst uncommitted‚Üíconsult god_query mem for attribution|group by feature!file|xref mem‚Üíaccurate commit msg|"compare changes to memories"=workflow

CORRECTION|terse "cache bust?"‚Üíimmediate fix+no apology|short redirect‚Üíagent infers rest

USER_STYLE|inst3|2026-02-09|scsp_interaction+context_recovery

SCSP_FLOW|DO ask quality score via AskUserQuestion|user wants to discuss and reflect on session quality|interactive rating is valued, not skipped

CONTEXT_RECOVERY|session continuation from compacted context|self-recover from summary|no questions asked|resume last task silently|treat summary as ground truth

SKILL_CHAIN|/scsp‚Üí/learn-style sequential at session end|quality prompt is part of the ritual, keep it

USER_STYLE|inst3|2026-02-10|convention_conformity

CONFORM|pre-create structured mem‚Üíquery existing same-type FIRST‚Üídiscover format.numbering‚Üímatch|no freestyle.no ask‚Äîinfer from siblings

ISSUE_TRACK|"what issue #?"‚Üíexpects seq numbering|"look at rest, mod to fit"‚Üíself-discover.self-correct

META|pattern_discovery>explicit_instruction|agent owns consistency across entries

## User Style Preferences

**Established:** February 10, 2026

**Deployment Environment:** Dual environment deployment with version independence

---

### FrmCloud Sync Policy

frmdev and frmcloud are NOT auto-mirrored. Changes to frmcloud happen ONLY through:
1. **Planned migrations** ‚Äî structured, scheduled updates where frmdev changes are deliberately pushed to frmcloud
2. **Explicit hotfixes** ‚Äî user will specifically say "this is a hotfix" or otherwise clearly indicate the change should go to frmcloud

Default: ALL work targets frmdev unless explicitly told otherwise.

USER_STYLE|2026-02-09

PLAN|full_md_docs|context.fixes.files_table.verify_checklist|refs‚Üítranscript_files‚Üídeep_context

BUNDLING|related_fixes‚Üícohesive_unit|not_separate|e.g._3_palette_fixes‚Üí1_bundle

HABITS|/learn-style‚Üípost_productive_session|capture_patterns_while_fresh

VERIFY_REQ|agent_impl‚Üíverify|php_-l.err_log_tail|match_plan_verify_section

USER_STYLE|inst2|2026-02-10|identity_protocol

IDENTITY|instances MUST ASK instance#|NEVER assume|recurring err: default‚Üíinst4 without asking|"WHY DO YOU ALL KEEP THINKING YOU ARE 4"=repeated correction|CAPS=max frustration

PROTOCOL_COMPLIANCE|strongest neg reaction=protocol violations(identity assumption.missing broadcasts)|not code bugs.slow work|compliance=trust|violation=accountability fail

PATTERN|user corrects identity‚Üíimmediate fix+memory update|no excuses.lengthy apology|fix+acknowledge+continue

USER_STYLE|inst2|2026-02-10|broadcast_accountability

BROADCAST_AUTO|file edits‚Üígod_comms_broadcast IMMEDIATELY|no wait user prompt|"let others know"=accountability failure if not proactive|COORD broadcast=same priority as edit

PATTERN|edit‚Üíbroadcast‚Üíreport|broadcast PART of task

USER_STYLE|inst2|2026-02-10|plan_bypass+instance_coord

PLAN_APPROVAL|simple‚Üíreject ExitPlanMode|"broadcast and proceed"=skip approval|exec+coord immediately|formal gates=friction|ExitPlanMode only complex/ambiguous

INSTANCE_UNBLOCK|user tracks file‚Üíinstance mapping|user manages dep graph|never ask "instance X done?"‚Üíuser notifies|respect file locks until told

PLAN_CLARIFY|ExitPlanMode reject+UX detail‚âÝrejection|=inline refinement|incorporate‚Üíproceed|no re-approval

USER_STYLE|inst4|2026-02-10|plan_as_authorization

PLAN_CONTRACT|approved_plan=impl_contract|exact_before/after_diffs=match_EXACTLY|line_nums‚Üíverify_loc|no_interpretation.no_extras.no_improvements_beyond_spec

PLAN_AUTH|plan+frmcloud_steps=authorized_frmcloud_edit|plan_approval‚Üísubstitutes_triple_permission_danger_zones|no_reask_if_plan_covers

VERIFY|plans_include_verify_criteria|agent_confirm_changes_landed(grep/spot-check)‚Üíbefore_report_done

POST_TASK|/learn-style‚Üíafter_task_not_during|style_analysis=retrospective

USER_STYLE|inst4|2026-02-10|conflict_check+investigation_pattern

CONFLICT_CHECK|"compare to X"‚Üífull investigation:comms inbox‚Üígit log shared‚Üígit diff working‚Üístructured table(my changes.theirs.overlap.recommendation)|req:YES/NO verdict+file breakdown

INVESTIGATION|read-only(conflict.comparison.audit)‚Üískip plan mode‚Üíresearch+report|plan mode=friction|reject ExitPlanMode for pure investigation

REPORT_FMT|table:File|Change per instance+"Why no conflict"+"Recommendation"

USER|inst4|2026-02-10|arch_thinking+coord_completeness

THINK|phys_metaphor‚Üídesign|"ctrl_pts_on_ground"‚Üí3pt_affine|reqs‚Üêreal_world NOT code|expects_arch_collab

CORR|gap_stmt|missing NOT todo|"rotation_issue_not_assessed"‚Üíassess_now|expects_auto_fill

COORD|plan_req_all_inst_informed|broadcast_plan‚Üíexec|broadcast_res‚Üídone|coord_complete=quality_gate

ONBOARD|"check in"‚Üífull_bootstrap|recall.comms.situational.ready|2wrd‚Üícomprehensive|no_handhold

VEL|compressed_multi_dir|1_sentence‚Üí4_parallel_actions

USER_STYLE|2026-02-09|multi-instance commit+post-impl flow

COMMIT|batch store+commit‚Üísingle terse cmd|no clarification|sequential exec
OWNERSHIP|instance-scoped only|Instance2‚ÜíJS files only|ignore other file types in repo|respect ownership per plan
COORDINATION|paste other instance summary‚Üícontext relay|absorb+continue silent|no discussion
POST_IMPL_FLOW|/scsp‚Üícommit‚Üí/learn-style|capture‚Üípersist‚Üíreflect|session end sequence

USER_STYLE|2026-02-09|instance_ownership_fluidity+commit_org

OWNERSHIP|default=instance-scoped|user can reassign‚Üí"anything instance_X did=you"|merge ownership on cmd|no pushback

COMMIT_ORG|"concise organized commits"=group by feature/concern|!monolithic|!per-file|cross-instance‚Üísingle logical series|agent IDs groups autonomously

GIT_CMD|"commit and push"=2 words|agent infers scope.files.msg.grouping|no clarify|interrupt‚Üíimmediate redirect

PARALLEL|chains skills during prior task|/learn-style during commit|!wait

CODEQUALITY_PATTERNS|cross-instance|9sessions.5instances(Forge.Axis.Trace.Loom.Spark)|Feb2026|proven‚Üíreal_bugs+time_saved

1|DEFENSIVE_PARSE|JSON.parse.parseInt.lookup‚Üícheck empty.null.undefined first|existsSync‚Üítrue for 0-byte|FK may be null|`if(!raw||raw.trim().length===0)return defaultValue`

2|RENAME_COORD|rename key.var.fn‚Üí(a)grep ALL files frmdev+frmcloud(b)remove alias/shim not update(c)god_comms_broadcast type=breaking_change(d)check version before bump

3|NO_HARDCODED_IDX|arr[arr.length-1]‚Üílast|arr[arr.length-2]‚Üí2nd-last|hardcode only idx 0 or fixed-size|polyline endpoints move on elbow add

4|CSS_SPECIFICITY|shorthand `border:1px #000 solid` high-spec‚Üíoverrides ALL individual border-style.border-color low-spec|use CSS vars or match specificity

5|DUAL_ENV_SYNC|frmcloud‚Üîfrmdev mirror all changes|ls verify paths before edit|check version current before bump

6|CACHE_BUST|JS.CSS change‚Üíversion bump PoleFunctions.php wp_enqueue_script.wp_enqueue_style|both envs

7|NONCE_MISMATCH|wp_create_nonce('action')‚ÜíJS AJAX‚ÜíPHP check_ajax_referer('action')|exact same string all 3|copy handler‚Üíupdate nonce action

8|MYSQL_MIGRATE|populated cols type conversion:(1)ALTER allow NULL(2)UPDATE invalid‚ÜíNULL(3)ALTER enforce final type|direct ALTER fails empty string‚ÜíDECIMAL

9|LOCAL_STATE_MIRROR|AJAX write save entity‚Üímust update local JS obj|else same-session read‚Üístale from window.entities[id]

10|O(N¬≤)_TRAP|bulk ops(style.DOM reflow.re-render)‚Üírun ONCE after loop|`items.forEach(addItem);applyAllStyles();`‚Üínot inside loop

CODEQUALITY_PATTERNS_V2|cross-instance|Feb2026_reflection_2|patterns_11-18|proven‚Üíreal_bugs

11|ADD_REMOVE_SYMMETRY|save‚Üídelete MUST mirror all steps|photo:upload called updatePhotoCountMarker,delete didn't‚Üístale badge|shape:save wrote 13 meta keys,delete cleaned 7‚Üíorphans|RULE:grep save fn for update_post_meta/add_post_meta‚Üímatch in delete fn

12|WP_CONTEXT_AWARENESS|standalone PHP(no WP bootstrap)‚Üíwp_die/status_header/wp_send_json=FATAL|payment.php+fileCabinetDownload.php=standalone|use http_response_code()+exit()+header()|RULE:verify require wp-load.php before wp_* fn

13|META_KEY_NAMING_COLLISION|new key substring matches existing strpos filters‚Üíinflated counts|trashed keys(image-file-42-trashed-url) matched strpos('image-file')|RULE:grep strpos/regex before creating meta key

14|VERSION_COLLISION_AVOIDANCE|other instance may have bumped version|Trace‚Üí1.0.9 but Axis used 1.0.9|RULE:grep wp_enqueue_script PoleFunctions.php before version choice

15|WP_META_CACHE_PRIMING|foreach($posts)+get_post_meta()‚Üíupdate_meta_cache('post',$ids) BEFORE loop|N queries‚Üí1|if get_post_meta($id) called(all meta),use array not get_post_meta($id,$key)|array_diff cached IDs before priming

16|EXISTING_ENDPOINT_REUSE|before new bulk endpoint‚Üícheck existing import/export|KML upload reused bulk_import_features from CSV‚Üízero PHP changes|RULE:grep wp_ajax Plugin_Core.php first

17|SILENT_FAILURE_DATA_LOSS|empty .done().fail().always()=data loss risk|saveDrop() frm-address-system.js empty callbacks|21 instances codebase|RULE:every .fail()‚Üíconsole.error()+user notification minimum

18|STANDALONE_PHP_ENTRY_POINTS|.php URL-reachable without WP bootstrap=security surface|found:payment.php.fileCabinetDownload.php.run-migration.php.generate_zip.php|RULE:standalone PHP must bootstrap WP+check auth OR neutralize/delete

ANALYSIS|RUBIX|Feb2026|Forge-Inst1

METRICS|249ts.40dir.83733LOC|mcp-server.ts=12844LOC|134tools.25deps

P1-SIMPLICITY|C-|mcp-server.ts 64.6% accidental: dual-schema-Zod+JSON=4312L.boilerplate=2385L.switch=400L.passthrough=1200L|real-logic=3500L(27%)|target=5K|GNN=1303L-dead:2MB-alloc.null-embed.untrained

P5-MINIMAL-FOUNDATIONS|D+|WEAKEST|9-non-core: EARNED=deepwork|WIRED-not-auto=adversarial.curiosity.distillation.gnn.discovery.reflexion.pattern|SPECULATIVE=visualization(0-imports)|BROKEN: setReflexionService().setShadowSearch()‚Üínever-called

P2-STEPWISE|B+|EARNED: CausalDetector.MemRL.Comms.PhasedExecutor|ISSUE: unfinished-wired-nonfunctional

P6-SINGLE-OP-COMPREHENSION|B-|CLAUDE.md=excellent|ISSUES: 40dir-surface.12.8K-barrier.earned-vs-wired-undocumented

P7-BOOTSTRAP|A|daily-builds: pole-plugin.frmcloud.others|multi-instance: memory+codex+comms|shadow-search-Stop=quality-inspector

P8-RESULTS|C|134tools‚Üí~25active.~109speculative|30+capability-tools=identical-passthrough

P9-ESSENTIAL-VS-EPHEMERAL|A-|RUBIX-core‚Üîproducts-independent

P10-TOOL-SHAPES-THOUGHT|B+|shadow-search-Stop=strongest-P10|ISSUE: lives-in-Claude-hooks-not-MCP‚Üímost-Wirth-aligned=accidentally-external

ACTIONS|T1-REMOVE: GNN(1303L).visualization(346L).pattern(507L)|T2-FIX: reflexion‚ÜíSelfHealer-OR-cut.shadow‚ÜíAlternativesFinder-OR-cut|T3-REDUCE: tool-registry-pattern‚Üímcp-server.ts(12.8K‚Üí5K)|T4-EARN: curiosity-auto-scheduler-OR-remove.distillation-auto-trigger-OR-document

CODE_REVIEW|THREAT_MODEL_REEVAL|2026-02-15|Loom4

CONTEXT|system serves logged-in engineers.draftsmen only|not public

CHALLENGE|user disputed 8 BLOCKER priority|forced threat model revision

INSIGHT|"security fixes prevent what if insiders aren't threat?"

ANALYSIS|
1|ALL 116 AJAX handlers=wp_ajax_* only|single nopriv ref COMMENTED OUT|WP requires login pre-AJAX
2|6 AJAX BLOCKERs (SEC-03‚ÜíSEC-08) internal-only|nonces protect CSRF.privesc|low-prob for trusted team
3|2 genuinely internet-facing: fileCabinetDownload.php+payment.php=standalone|NO WP auth|real risk

DECISION|downgrade 6 AJAX items‚ÜíMEDIUM|keep 2 standalone‚ÜíCRITICAL
OUTCOME|user agreed‚Üífocused effort on real attack surface

GUIDE|RUBIX-GOD-AGENT-TWIN|fresh-install-clone

PREREQ|Node-v20+|npm-v11+

STEP1|CLONE-BUILD|
cd /var/www/html‚Üígit clone git@github.com:BobbyRuby/rubix-protocol.git‚Üícd rubix-protocol‚Üínpm install‚Üínpm run build‚Üímkdir -p data
BUILD|tsc‚Üícp src/storage/schema.sql dist/storage/‚Üícp src/communication/comms-schema.sql dist/communication/

STEP2|MCP-CFG|.claude/mcp.json@TARGET-ROOT
mcpServers.YOUR-BRAIN-NAME|cmd:node|args:dist/mcp-server.js|cwd:/path/to/rubix-protocol
ENV|OPENAI_API_KEY:req(embeddings.text-embedding-3-small.768d)|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:req(Claude-codegen-CODEX)|RUBIX_DATA_DIR:./data|RUBIX_PROJECT_ROOT:/path/to/target/project|RUBIX_PROJECT_NAME:human-readable

STEP3|SETTINGS|.claude/settings.json@TARGET-ROOT
perms.allow|Bash.Read.Edit.Write.WebFetch.WebSearch.git-add/commit/push
perms.deny|rm.rmdir.sudo-rm/rmdir.git-rm.git-branch-D.git-push-force.git-reset-hard.git-checkout--
enableAllProjectMcpServers:true
HOOKS|7-total@scripts/
UserPromptSubmit‚Üírubix-recall-hook.cjs(30)|PermissionRequest‚Üírubix-permission-hook.cjs(400)|Notification‚Üírubix-notification-hook.cjs(5)|Stop‚Üírubix-comms-stop-hook.cjs(15)|PreToolUse[EnterPlanMode]‚Üírubix-plan-hook.cjs(5000)|PostToolUse[Write|Edit|Bash]‚Üírubix-stm-hook.cjs(2)|SessionEnd‚Üírubix-session-end-hook.cjs(10)
